case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK. VS. GLENN S WAGNER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GLEN WAGNER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DECLARATION OF ADAM YAKIRA RE PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 15138064) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK. A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURIAN BANK'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT GLENN S. WAGNER WAS SERVED WITH REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE ON MARCH 19, 2015. NO RESPONSE WAS PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT GLENN S. WAGNER. DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPONSE AFTER MAY 1, 2015 AND FAILED TO DO SO. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $840.00 ARE ORDERED TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT GLENN S. WAGNER WITHIN 20 DAYS OF BEING SERVED WITH THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER ARISING FROM THIS HEARING. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VAN ZANDT. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURIAN BANK'S unopposed Motion for Order to Deem Matters Admitted and for Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant GLENN S. WAGNER was served with Requests for Admissions, Set One on March 19, 2015. No response was provided by Defendant GLENN S. WAGNER. Defendant was given an opportunity to response after May 1, 2015 and failed to do so. Sanctions in the amount of $840.00 are ORDERED to be paid by Defendant GLENN S. WAGNER within 20 days of being served with the Notice of Entry of the Order arising from this hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
